title: DTS e-ink node compatible and properties review
description: P0: compatible='gooddisplay,gdew0154m10' has no matching Zephyr driver/binding (ultrachip,uc81xx or solomon,ssd16xx preferred). P1: Confirm exact panel resolution (152x152 vs 200x200 for GDEW0154M10). P2: 'enable-gpios' property name may not be recognized by driver; check for 'power-gpios' or driver-specific. Add to aliases or chosen in board? Update yaml supported: display. Tag: codereview
close_reason: Fixed all P0-P4 via compatible change to ultrachip,uc81xx, added power-gpios, enabled in overlay+chosen+conf; 3 codereview passes converged on opinion/P3 only (resolution confirmed 152x152, driver binds)
